testcase.name: findByUserOrderByTrainDateDesc_日付降順で取得できる

[training-app] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table training_records ( id bigint generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6) not null, exercise_name varchar(100) not null, memo varchar(500), muscle_group varchar(255), reps integer not null check ((reps>=1) and (reps<=999)), sets integer not null check ((sets<=10) and (sets>=1)), train_date date not null, updated_at timestamp(6), weight float(53) not null, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( id bigint generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6) not null, email varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, updated_at timestamp(6), username varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists users drop constraint if exists UK6dotkott2kjsp8vw4d0m25fb7 Hibernate: alter table if exists users add constraint UK6dotkott2kjsp8vw4d0m25fb7 unique (email) Hibernate: alter table if exists training_records add constraint FK8s4xw6otg9rmm3iw5nbcw4c62 foreign key (user_id) references users 2026-06-16T07:45:34.597+09:00 INFO 77595 --- [training-app] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactories : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-16T07:45:34.958+09:00 INFO 77595 --- [training-app] [ main] c.e.t.r.TrainingRecordRepositoryTest : Started TrainingRecordRepositoryTest in 1.323 seconds (process running for 1.713) Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id, tr1_0.created_at, tr1_0.exercise_name, tr1_0.memo, tr1_0.muscle_group, tr1_0.reps, tr1_0.sets, tr1_0.train_date, tr1_0.updated_at, tr1_0.user_id, tr1_0.weight from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.user_id=? order by tr1_0.train_date desc

testcase.name: findByIdAndUser_正しいユーザーの記録を取得できる
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id, tr1_0.created_at, tr1_0.exercise_name, tr1_0.memo, tr1_0.muscle_group, tr1_0.reps, tr1_0.sets, tr1_0.train_date, tr1_0.updated_at, tr1_0.user_id, tr1_0.weight from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.id=? and tr1_0.user_id=?

testcase.name: findByIdAndUser_他ユーザーの記録は取得できない
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id, tr1_0.created_at, tr1_0.exercise_name, tr1_0.memo, tr1_0.muscle_group, tr1_0.reps, tr1_0.sets, tr1_0.train_date, tr1_0.updated_at, tr1_0.user_id, tr1_0.weight from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.id=? and tr1_0.user_id=?

testcase.name: existsByIdAndUser_存在する記録はtrueを返す
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.id=? and tr1_0.user_id=? fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: findByUserAndTrainDateBetween_期間外の記録は取得されない
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id, tr1_0.created_at, tr1_0.exercise_name, tr1_0.memo, tr1_0.muscle_group, tr1_0.reps, tr1_0.sets, tr1_0.train_date, tr1_0.updated_at, tr1_0.user_id, tr1_0.weight from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.user_id=? and tr1_0.train_date between ? and ?

testcase.name: findByUserAndTrainDateBetween_期間内の記録を取得できる
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id, tr1_0.created_at, tr1_0.exercise_name, tr1_0.memo, tr1_0.muscle_group, tr1_0.reps, tr1_0.sets, tr1_0.train_date, tr1_0.updated_at, tr1_0.user_id, tr1_0.weight from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.user_id=? and tr1_0.train_date between ? and ?

testcase.name: existsByIdAndUser_存在しない記録はfalseを返す
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password, updated_at, username) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into training_records (created_at, exercise_name, memo, muscle_group, reps, sets, train_date, updated_at, user_id, weight) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select tr1_0.id from training_records tr1_0 where tr1_0.id=? and tr1_0.user_id=? fetch first ? rows only
